description: Expected rule IDs for the 8 pre-planted defects in the public procurement E2E fixture

defects.description: L4-001 spans multiple departments (Reception, IT, Finance), multiple systems (Portal, ERP), and multiple locations (HQ + Branch) without 4D boundary split
L5-ORPHAN has parent_id pointing to non-existent L4-NONEXISTENT node
L6-004 is named SAP_Vendor_Lookup which is a tool/technical name, not a business action
SOP-002 has empty L6 reference field, violating non-empty L6 reference requirement
Missing 'Approve Application' Task in BPMN. L5-006 'Approve Application' has no corresponding TASK element in the diagram
Lane 'Finance Officer' contains tasks 'Check Eligibility' and 'Score Proposal' which in the architecture are assigned to 'Committee Member' and 'Analyst', not 'Finance Officer'
End event 'end-event-orphan' (Cancelled) has no incoming sequence flow, making it an unconnected element
Flow-6 line visually crosses flow-4 due to routing through coordinates that intersect
